title: Echo
content:
Dweller in hollow places, hills and rocks,
    Daughter of Silence and old Solitude,
    Tip-toe she stands within her cave or wood,
    Her only life the noises that she mocks.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "Echo"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
